backstory.original: A once trusted guardian and advisor of Duke Maldwyn of Daggerford, Nayeli Goldflower is now a paladin without a lord who wanders Toril on the hunt for devils and those who would summon and commune with the infernal. She worships Tyr, the god of justice, who has blessed her sword to seek out and destroy any infernal presence.
backstory.display: 娜亚莉·金花曾是匕首滩的马尔德温公爵所信任的监护人和顾问，如今她是一位没有领主的圣武士，在托瑞尔游荡，追捕魔鬼和那些召唤并且与地狱交流的人。她崇拜正义之神提尔，提尔赐福了她的剑，让她寻找并消灭所有的地狱生物。

description.original: Nayeli cleaves all targets near the closest enemy.
description.display: 娜亚莉顺劈距离最近的敌人附近的所有目标。

description.original: Nayeli deals massive damage to a random enemy and stuns all enemies.
description.display: 娜亚莉对一名随机敌人造成大量伤害，并眩晕全部敌人。

longDescription.original: Nayeli leaps to a random enemy, dealing massive damage and stunning all enemies.
longDescription.display: 娜亚莉跃向一名随机敌人，对其造成大量伤害，并眩晕全部敌人。

description.desc: Increases the damage of Champions in the column behind $source by $(amount)%
处于$source后列的勇士提升 $(amount)% 伤害

tipText.original: Nayeli increases the damage of Champions in the column behind hers. Place her in front of your most damaging Champions.
tipText.display: 纳耶莉使纵队后方的勇士伤害提高。将她放置在杀伤力最强的勇士前方。

description.desc: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each enemy attacking $source and/or each enemy enrage stack.
每有一名攻击$source或使其堆叠怒气的敌人，即所有勇士提升 $(amount)% 伤害。

tipText.original: Nayeli increases your formation's damage for each enemy attacking her. Place her at the front of your formation to take advantage of this.
tipText.display: 每个攻击纳耶莉的敌人均使阵型伤害提高。将她放置在阵型前方从而利用此效果。

specializationDescription.original: Nayeli focuses on rallying her fellow Champions and further increasing the damage of anyone in the column behind her.
specializationDescription.display: 纳耶莉专注于振奋勇士战友，并进一步提高同纵队后方所有人的伤害。

specializationDescription.original: Nayeli focuses on tanking enemies and party survivability, keeping her foes from attacking her friends.
specializationDescription.display: 娜亚莉专注于抵御敌人和强化探险队的生存能力，防止敌人攻击她的盟友。

description.desc: Increases the Health of all other Champions by $amount% of $source's Max Health
提高所有其他勇士的生命值，数值相当于$source最大生命值的 $amount%。

description.original: The forces of darkness will not overcome us!
description.display: 黑暗的力量无法战胜我们！

description.original: You call that a hit? It barely tickled.
description.display: 你管这叫攻击？连挠痒痒都算不上。

description.original: Nothing can take down this champion.
description.display: 没什么能击倒这位勇士。
勇气会随着经验而增长。

description.original: It'll take more than a couple of you to take me down!
description.display: 想放倒我，还得多来几个你这样的！

description.original: We must not give in to our fears!
The bullywugs are easy to train, once you learn to fit in with them.
description.display: 一旦你学会了怎么跟狂蛙人相处融洽，它们是很容易训练的。

description.original: One of you has to be powerful enough to give me a good fight.
description.display: 你们之中必须有足够强大的人，才配与我酣战一场。

description.original: As long as I have a weapon, my form doesn't matter.
description.display: 只要我手持武器，形态无关紧要。

effects.description: Nayeli also counts as a Githyanki

description.original: Does anyone want to go for a swim?

effects.description: Nayeli also counts as a Triton

name.display: 吉斯洋基人变异娜亚莉
